title: Translating Advanced XPath Expressions to Efficient CSS Selectors
scenario: A user wants to translate an XPath expression for a complex web page into an equivalent CSS selector to improve the webpage's responsiveness. The XPath expression includes multiple attribute filters and descendant relationships. The target CSS selector must be readable, maintainable, and optimized for modern browsers. The user has a limited understanding of CSS selectors and needs guidance on how to create an efficient translation.
constraints: Must use the latest CSS syntax
Must include a brief explanation of the translation process

evaluationCriteria.description: The accuracy of the XPath to CSS translation
The readability and maintainability of the translated CSS selector
The validity and optimization of the CSS syntax used
The quality and clarity of the explanation provided
